'''Alk'Lellish III''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Alk'Lellish system/Legends|Alk'Lellish system]] of the [[Sumitra sector/Legends|Sumitra sector]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Lellish]], as well as the dangerous carnivore known as the [[ketrann]]. [[Wilek Nereus]] hunted the ketrann at one point.

==History==
Remaining loyal to the Republic for the next several [[Millennium|millennia]], the world established itself economically by advertising the vast expanses of [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] as prime hunting grounds for [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] citizens.<ref name="TEA" /> After the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[King/Legends|King]] [[Alaric (Sephi)|Alaric]] the whole sector including this planet, left the Republic and joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

With the establishment of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the citizens of Alk'Lellish gave a share of their profits to the local [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] in exchange for the right to limit the number of hunters permitted to [[Death/Legends|kill]] full-grown ketrann each season. The Imperial [[Wilek Nereus]] eventually attained the position of [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]], continuing to be paid off by the Lellish.<ref name="TEA" />

{{Planet-stub}}
